content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — description.txt claims "Built-in ad blocker", "AI-powered suggestions", and "Works fully offline", but ContentView.swift only implements an in-memory task list with no ad-blocking, ML/AI, or persistence code.
Pierre: Apple rejects apps whose marketing claims aren't backed by actual functionality, since reviewers test described features directly. Here three prominent claims (ad blocker, AI suggestions, offline support) have zero code evidence — no Network Extension, no CoreML/ML imports, and no persistence layer. Either implement these features or remove the claims from the description before submitting.
